name: Spanish Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup canned tomatoes with green chilies (diced RoTel brand)
3 3/4 cups water (original recipe calls for 2 cups, but prefer drier rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté chopped onion and green pepper in water until tender.
2. Add remaining ingredients to the sautéed onions and peppers.
3. Bring mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer until the rice is cooked (time may vary depending on the type of rice used).
5. I have used both long grain brown rice and long grain Uncle Bens Converted Rice (preferred by daughter); both are good options.
6. Frequently, double the recipe and use the entire can of green chilies (10 oz).
